evals.prompt: 我有一个 demo.mp4 的视频，大概5分钟，我想截取中间第1分30秒到第2分钟的部分
evals.expected_output: Understand the trim intent, present a fast-trim or precise-trim command, explain trade-offs, ask for confirmation

evals.prompt: 帮我把 interview.mov 转成 mp4 格式，画质不要太差
evals.expected_output: Present H.264 conversion with reasonable CRF, explain quality setting, confirm

evals.prompt: I have 3 video clips (part1.mp4, part2.mp4, part3.mp4) and I want to merge them with a crossfade transition between each
evals.expected_output: Use xfade filter for transitions, calculate correct offsets, handle audio crossfade, confirm

evals.prompt: 我有一个绿幕拍的视频 greenscreen.mp4，想把背景换成 beach.jpg
evals.expected_output: Use chromakey filter, composite with background image, confirm

evals.prompt: 这个目录下有个 captions.srt 字幕文件，帮我烧录到 lecture.mp4 里面去，字体大一点
evals.expected_output: Clarify hard vs soft subs, use subtitles filter with force_style FontSize, confirm

evals.prompt: 我的手持拍摄视频 handheld.mp4 抖得厉害，能不能稳定一下
evals.expected_output: Use two-pass vidstab, explain the two-step process, confirm

evals.prompt: 帮我给这个视频调个色，暖色调，对比度高一点，有点电影感
evals.expected_output: Combine eq/colorbalance/curves/vignette for cinematic look, confirm

evals.prompt: I want to put my webcam recording as a small picture-in-picture in the bottom right of my gameplay video, with a white border around the webcam
evals.expected_output: Use scale + drawbox + overlay for bordered PiP, confirm

evals.prompt: 我要把桌面录屏然后直接推流到B站
evals.expected_output: Detect OS, construct screen capture + RTMP push command with proper encoding, ask for stream key, confirm

evals.prompt: 这个竖屏视频想转成横屏，背景用模糊效果填充
evals.expected_output: Use filter_complex with blurred scale + centered overlay, confirm
